rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly includes perceived healthfulness/“health halo” as a focal moderator and studies quantity-driven increases in food intake, while the cited paper is a core health-halo mechanism paper showing low-fat labels increase consumption via serving-size and guilt inferences. Given this strong construct/mechanism overlap (despite only one DOI-matched reference record and no in-text snippet), it is plausibly more than an incidental mention.
